form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 1760m at Narrabri was 7th-10.2 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Katastrophee (2:08.90) in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $18. Before that, 6th (Sr1) over 1760m at Narrabri, beaten 15 m by Gotonebettor (2:09.40) in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $2.90. Can make an impact from the ace draw.

Before that, 6th (Sr1) over 1760m at Narrabri, beaten 15 m by Gotonebettor (2:09.40) in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $2.90. Can make an impact from the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for some distance in the early part of the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh behind Lachies Ideal at this track over 1609m in a NR 45 to 48 on March 26 at $4.80. Performed better the start before with a good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 1609m at Newcastle was 6th-11.15 at the bell, beaten 1.75 m by Quickshift Girl (1:55.50) in NR up to 50 on March 19 at $19. Draws well and this suits.

Draws well and this suits.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1760m at Narrabri, beaten 24 m by Cinnamon (2:09.60) in No NR on April 12 at $31. Two runs back was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1780m at Redcliffe, beaten 40 m by Heavensent (2:14.70) in 3yo Up to 1 LTW on February 11 at $41. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr1) over 1760m after showing early speed at Narrabri beaten 90 m by Cinnamon (2:09.60) in No NR on April 12 at $61. Two runs back 8th (Sr4) over 1980m at this track beaten 30 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $61. Has the task ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 8th (Fr1) over 1760m after showing early speed at Narrabri beaten 90 m by Cinnamon (2:09.60) in No NR on April 12 at $61. Two runs back 8th (Sr4) over 1980m at this track beaten 30 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $61. Has the task ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up inside the 100m and unable to be driven forward.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Cinnamon at Narrabri over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on April 5. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Cinnamon at Narrabri over 1760m in a No NR on April 12 at $15. Form sound and certainly one of the contenders.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Cinnamon at Narrabri over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on April 5. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Cinnamon at Narrabri over 1760m in a No NR on April 12 at $15. Form sound and certainly one of the contenders.

form.formComment: Last start by 3 m (Sr2) at Newcastle (1:56.80) beating Keayang Harlow in NR 40 to 43 on April 6 at $4.80 at the bell was 3rd-4.13. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 3 m (Sr2) at Newcastle (1:56.80) beating Keayang Harlow in NR 40 to 43 on April 6 at $4.80 at the bell was 3rd-4.13. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped racing around the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1760m at Narrabri was 4th-4.6 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Annie Crocker (2:08.30) in NR up to 50 on April 12 at $4. Two runs back won by 2.25 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Narrabri (2:09.40) beating Whiskey Royale in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $6.50. Expect another good showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start solid effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1760m at Narrabri was 4th-4.6 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Annie Crocker (2:08.30) in NR up to 50 on April 12 at $4. Two runs back won by 2.25 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Narrabri (2:09.40) beating Whiskey Royale in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $6.50. Expect another good showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up over the concluding stages and ran to the finish under some restraint.
Locked wheels for a short distance inside the 100m and was unbalanced.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 2160m after racing wide at Narrabri, beaten 40 m by Otis Rising (2:41.90) in NR 45 to 55 on April 12 at $34. Two runs back 3rd (Fr3) over 2160m after showing early speed at Narrabri, beaten 6 m by Cut Glass (2:39.30) in NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $5.50. May do better.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 2160m at Narrabri, at the bell was 8th-12.2 beaten 13 m by Otis Rising (2:41.90) in NR 45 to 55 on April 12 at $10. Before that, 4th (Sr1) over 2160m at Narrabri beaten 5.5 m by Rainbow Jet (2:40.10) in NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $6. Deserves another chance.
